title: Multicolor Pinata Buster (86cm) 1 Count - Party Fun Essential for Exciting Celebrations
features: PINATA BUSTER PERFECTION: Swing your way into the ultimate party experience with our multicolor pinata buster, designed to make your celebrations more exhilarating and memorable.
VIBRANT MULTICOLOR DESIGN: Our 86cm pinata buster features an eye-catching multicolor pattern, adding a splash of fun and visual appeal to any birthday party, wedding, or festive gathering.
ONE & DONE PARTY ESSENTIAL: This package includes 1 durable pinata buster, ensuring a fuss-free party solution so you can focus on enjoying the celebrations with your friends and loved ones.

LEVEL UP YOUR PARTY GAME: Measuring at an impressive 86cm in length, our multicolor pinata buster is perfect for players of all ages, providing a thrilling and interactive way to entertain your guests.
IDEAL ADDITION FOR ANY CELEBRATION: Transform your special occasion into an unforgettable affair with our party fun essential pinata buster, suitable for a wide range of exciting and thematic events.
description: Product Description The stick is 30 inches long and features three bright colours! Parties are more fun with a pinata, and what better way to it open than with this Plastic Fringed Pinata Stick. In combination with a fun candy-filled pinata, it is a smart addition to any birthday party or family gathering. This 30" pinata buster features multi-colored fringe covering a plastic stick and is long enough for pinata-busters of all ages. Box Contains 1 x Pinata Buster
